meta.title: 🏔️ Adventure Tours | Mountain Tours, Guides & Rentals in the Caucasus
meta.description: Adventure Tours - guided mountain climbing, trekking, food tours and vehicle rentals in the Caucasus Mountains.

hero.slide1_text: Climbs, food tours and unforgettable adventures
hero.slide2_text: Tastings of the finest local cheese and wine
hero.slide3_text: 4x4s, motorbikes and bicycles for the mountains

about.title: We live in these mountains — and we share them with you
about.text1: Adventure Tours started as a small group of passionate guides. Today it's a team of 25 certified instructors running over 150 tours a year.
about.text2: We don't work from a template: every route is built around the specific group.

sections.quick_booking_text: Leave a request and we'll find the perfect tour for you
